Zendesk

Resolve Zendesk tickets faster with AI that reasons, acts, and learns from every conversation.

Learn More

Salesforce

Learn More

palette.notes: Body background is a warm off-white rgb(250,246,242). Body text is near-black rgb(10,0,20). Header nav appears to render white text on transparent (dark hero behind it). The first button text is near-white rgb(252,251,250).

paragraph.fontFamily: Helvetica, Arial, "Hiragino Sans GB", STXihei, "Microsoft YaHei", "WenQuanYi Micro Hei", Hind, "MS Gothic", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", NanumBarunGothic, sans-serif

fonts.notes: Primary display font is 'Control Upright Variable' — a variable sans-serif. Body paragraphs fall back to Helvetica/Arial stack.

sections.gist: Maven helps enterprises deliver the customer experiences that delight — empowering CX, support, operations, and AI teams with automation that resolves issues across the entire customer journey.
sections.fullText:
Who we serve

Maven helps enterprises deliver the customer experiences that delight — empowering CX, support, operations, and AI teams with automation that resolves issues across the entire customer journey.

Customer Service
Learn More
Customer Support
Learn More
Customer Experience

sections.gist: Core capabilities that power accurate automation, consistent decisions, and enterprise-grade trust.
sections.fullText:
Features

Core capabilities that power accurate automation, consistent decisions, and enterprise-grade trust.

Data & Insights
A real-time, unified analytics layer that reveals CX trends, automation impact, and real-time performance.

Inbox & Knowledge Graph
A governed knowledge foundation with automated quality checks that keep answers accurate and current.

Trust & Compliance
Certified security, privacy, and governance built into every interaction and workflow, validated through independent audits and real-time guardrails.

Channels
One AI agent operating consistently across voice, chat, email, and internal tools using your existing stack.

Product
AI built for the full customer journey, unifying reasoning, actions, and knowledge across every touchpoint.

AI Agent Platform | AI Agents | AI Agent Designer | AI Voice Agent

sections.gist: Zendesk, Salesforce, Freshdesk — resolve tickets faster, unify CRM data, supercharge knowledge base.
Customer testimonials carousel — Anthony Skilton, Tara Clark, Jeff Ho, David Doyle
sections.fullText:
Training our old chatbot to respond to different support scenarios took hundreds of hours. Maven learned the answers from the moment it integrated with our systems.

Anthony Skilton — Operations and Systems Manager

Maven's ability to give our customers highly curated answers 24/7 is absolutely huge for us. Now, they get better, faster support, and our team has time back for high-touch tickets.

Tara Clark — Senior Client Support Manager

Customer support is often a tradeoff between quality, speed, and cost. But with Maven, we don't have to compromise. We can give our customers the very best support while keeping our team lean.

Jeff Ho — VP of Operations

Just one week into the trial, rep solves per hour increased 25%. With increased efficiency on reactive operational support, we can invest more heavily in the proactive retention dollar activities.

David Doyle — Head of Customer Support

sections.gist: Learn more link — Lottie animation showing security certifications
Make the first move. Request a free personalized demo. Inline form: First Name, Last Name, Business Email, Company Name, consent checkbox, Submit.

animDetails.notes: Hero uses a Lottie JSON animation (hero-lottie-2). Security section uses a Lottie for certifications badges. Webflow IX2 drives scroll-triggered reveal animations across sections. Swiper.js (cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/swiper@12) powers the testimonials carousel. SmoothScroll.js present for scroll behavior.

imagery.notes: Hero uses Lottie JSON (not video/canvas). 4 video elements on page (likely product demo clips in lower sections). 134 images — includes customer logo SVGs/PNGs, testimonial headshots, product UI screenshots. 47 SVGs inline.
